readback.result_ready_contract: python3 scripts/openclaw_company_ops.py work-unit result-ready --work-unit-id WU-260609-958 --artifact-root docs/examples/manual-dry-run --team build-lab --result <result-summary> --evidence docs/examples/manual-dry-run/WU-260609-958/evidence.md --verification <verification-summary> --source-ref docs/examples/manual-dry-run/WU-260609-958/evidence.md --target channel:1512413731752116335 --channel discord --account default --project-sync-field-map ~/.openclaw/state/openclaw-company-ops/project-field-map.json --project-sync-ledger ~/.openclaw/state/openclaw-company-ops/claims/ledger.json --project-sync-audit-log ~/.openclaw/state/openclaw-company-ops/project-sync-audit.jsonl --closeout-delegate-runtime openclaw-agent --closeout-delegate-agent main --closeout-delegate-adapter command --closeout-delegate-adapter-command 'python3 scripts/openclaw_closeout_delegate_sessions_send.py' --publish --format json

instructions: Do not mutate outside the assigned Work Unit scope.
Follow the Assignment Packet subagent_budget as a prompt/packet contract; do not exceed 5 without explicit approval.
Return result evidence through the result-ready path with a fresh closeout delegate wake.
Replace <result-summary> and <verification-summary> with concrete text before running the result-ready command.
Do not publish closeout, Project mutation, or owner completion from the Team Lead dispatch.

result_ready_contract.rule: Team Lead submits source-backed evidence and enqueues a fresh OL closeout delegate; the delegate may publish only through guarded closeout.
